chapter_title.ar: باب مَا ذُبِحَ لِغَيْرِ الْقِبْلَةِ أَوْ تُرِكَ التَّسْمِيَةُ وَ الْجُنُبِ يَذْبَحُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 8 – What is slaughtered towards other than the Qiblah, or the Naming (Bismillah) is neglected, and the one with sexual impurity slaughters

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/16)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/16)
text: لَا بَأْسَ أَنْ يَذْبَحَ الرَّجُلُ وَ هُوَ جُنُبٌ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of his companions,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There is no problem if the man slaughters and he was with sexual impurity’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain persons of his people who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘It is not unlawful if a person after sexual intercourse and before Ghusl (bath) slaughters an animal.”’
